_comment: Input schema for a custom 'Escalate' Return-to-Control tool. Create this in the AI agent designer (Add tool -> Create new AI Tool -> type 'Return to Control'). When Aria invokes it, the conversation ends and these fields are written to Lex session attributes, which the contact flow reads via a 'Check contact attributes' block (Namespace=Lex, Key=Session attributes, Session Attribute Key=Tool) to route to the advisor queue with context. Schema verified against the AWS agentic-self-service example.

customerIntent.description: A brief phrase describing what the customer wants to accomplish

sentiment.description: Customer's emotional state during the conversation

escalationSummary.description: Summary for the advisor: what the customer asked, what was attempted, and why escalation is needed
